IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18422164.pdf)
SUMMARY: Results-driven professional with comprehensive experience in human resources, customer service, and financial services; strengths include problem-solving, strategic thinking and creativity; known as a self-motivated individual with the ability to work well with others in fast-paced environments with outstanding communication skills.
SKILLS: articulate, benefits, case management, employee communications, Human Resources, payroll, processing payroll, personnel, policies, processes, quality, recruiting, research, Staffing, phone, workflow

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR SPECIALIST
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Jul 2013 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Support the HR Operations Service Delivery model by serving as a primary contact for escalated issues.', 'Actively listen and resolve customer needs related to Human Resource Services.', 'Monitor case management queues and ensure accurate documentation of issue resolution.', 'Provide support to senior team members on special projects.', 'Maintain employee records through imaging and indexing documents.']

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: STAFFING SPECIALIST
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Jun 2008 - Jun 2013
DESCRIPTION: ['On-site point of contact for Co-op/Intern program.', 'Completed applicant tracking in Hire systems and on-boarded co-ops/interns.', 'Processed payroll and created Identity Manager accounts/badging.', 'Conducted exit interviews with co-ops.']

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: STAFFING COORDINATOR
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Aug 2007 - Apr 2008
DESCRIPTION: ['Responded to associate benefit questions and resolved issues.', 'Assisted with HR-related training and workshops.', 'Maintained current knowledge of HR practices, laws, and regulations.']

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: RECRUITING COORDINATOR
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Sep 2004 - Aug 2007
DESCRIPTION: ['Conducted phone interviews with applicants.', 'Developed relationships with key resources for sourcing candidates.']

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Feb 2001 - Apr 2004
DESCRIPTION: ['Answered inbound calls for 401(k) customers.', 'Processed transactions on 401(k) accounts.']

SOURCE: 18422164.pdf
JOB TITLE: TRUSTEE BOARD MEMBER
COMPANY: Company Name, City, State
DATES: Sep 2014 - Dec 2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Assisted with making decisions for the church.', "Processed payroll checks and analyzed/amended the church's budget."]
